## Type of Change
- [ ] ✨ Feature (`feat`)
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (`fix`)
- [ ] ♻️  Refactor (`refactor`)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement (`perf`)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation (`docs`)
- [ ] 🧪 Test (`test`)
- [ ] 🔧 Build / CI (`build` / `ci`)
- [ ] 🔀 Revert (`revert`)

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added / updated
- [ ] Integration tests added / updated
- [ ] E2E tests added / updated
- [ ] Manually tested in browser (Chrome / Firefox / Safari)

## Checklist
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits (`type(scope): description`)
- [ ] Code is self-reviewed
- [ ] No new `console.log` / debug statements
- [ ] Accessibility requirements considered (keyboard, screen reader, contrast)
- [ ] No hard-coded secrets or credentials
- [ ] Bundle size impact acceptable (see bundle-size check below)
